feed.title: ResMod Solutions
feed.subtitle: Expert modelling for CO₂ storage, H₂ storage, EOR, and reservoir performance. Hands-on open-source training for students.

entry.title: Welcome to ResMod Solutions Blog
entry.content: This is where I’ll share simulation tips, open‑source tool tutorials, and insights from real projects. Stay tuned!
entry.summary: This is where I’ll share simulation tips, open‑source tool tutorials, and insights from real projects. Stay tuned!
